{{Shell
|name=Traitor's Shell
|image=Traitor's Shell.png
|description=After traveler agent 13 betrayed the rest, agent 9's Snail Shell became green from anger. They were close friends, and sometimes agent 9 sighs while looking at agent 13's file: I'll be underestimated to betray after it!
|affct=FTH
|hard=ATK
|source=Divine Neutral Chest (0.4%)
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=5
|fire=2
|wind=4
|form=Angel
|element=Water
|realm=Murika
|orangehard=HP
}}
